role: Scholarship Program Coordinator (Office of Scholarships, 0.75 FTE)

key_points.one_liner: P1c — strong on program coordination + student-facing service; honest stretch on financial-aid-office specifics. JD 'What You Will Need': Ba
key_points.our_fit_analysis: P1c — strong on program coordination + student-facing service; honest stretch on financial-aid-office specifics. JD 'What You Will Need': Bachelor's, higher-ed environment experience, exceptional customer service, sensitive conversations, strong communication, office software, public speaking, planning/organizational/analytical skills, team orientation, equity commitment. Jamie's TRUE bridge: primary point of contact for students/participants at InGenius (advising on processes/deadlines), 20+ program coordination, 600+ webinar facilitation/presentations, Kronos customer service + recruiting-event/panel hosting, data/records fluency. POWERFUL authentic hook: she is a major scholarship recipient herself (Freeman Asian full-tuition + Tuck Bridge) — used truthfully in cover + essay. She does NOT have financial-aid/scholarship-office experience (ScholarDollars/Slate) — cover is candid. DRIVER'S LICENSE required (role drives univ/personal vehicle): Jamie HAS a valid license — eligible.
key_points.sponsorship_signal: Cap-exempt public university. No 'no sponsorship'/ITAR/citizenship language. EEO + fair-chance employer. Sponsorship-safe.
key_points.source_note: no full JD captured; key points composed from our record fields (jd_source=none).
